records.m_Talk_ENG: Damn that whale! It's more troublesome than it looks...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Damn that whale! It's more troublesome than it looks...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Damn that whale! It's more troublesome than it looks...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: When it realizes it's at a disadvantage, it shoots up into the sky, and we can't land a critical blow...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: When it realizes it's at a disadvantage, it shoots up into the sky, and we can't land a critical blow...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: When it realizes it's at a disadvantage, it shoots up into the sky, and we can't land a critical blow...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, Junk food!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, Junk food!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, Junk food!

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the whale keeps damaging the dimension surface, the number of low-level C.O.s keeps increasing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the whale keeps damaging the dimension surface, the number of low-level C.O.s keeps increasing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the whale keeps damaging the dimension surface, the number of low-level C.O.s keeps increasing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, we'll be completely surrounded by C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, we'll be completely surrounded by C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, we'll be completely surrounded by C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch, I know that already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch, I know that already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch, I know that already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bombardment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bombardment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bombardment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Both of you, get inside my barrier!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Both of you, get inside my barrier!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Both of you, get inside my barrier!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...!* *Huff...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you all right, Katharina? You look pale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you all right, Katharina? You look pale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you all right, Katharina? You look pale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm dizzy from using too much blood, but I can manage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm dizzy from using too much blood, but I can manage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm dizzy from using too much blood, but I can manage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just let me drink plenty later, all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just let me drink plenty later, all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just let me drink plenty later, all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, Dean of Law! You got anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, Dean of Law! You got anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, Dean of Law! You got anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that whale leaves the Grand Dimension Crevice and enters the city, secrecy will be the least of our problems!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that whale leaves the Grand Dimension Crevice and enters the city, secrecy will be the least of our problems!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that whale leaves the Grand Dimension Crevice and enters the city, secrecy will be the least of our problems!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is one way... But it is a gamble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is one way... But it is a gamble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is one way... But it is a gamble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your name was Katharina, correct?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your name was Katharina, correct?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your name was Katharina, correct?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The moment the C.O. descends to the ground, drop the barrier and bind it with hemomancy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The moment the C.O. descends to the ground, drop the barrier and bind it with hemomancy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The moment the C.O. descends to the ground, drop the barrier and bind it with hemomancy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will be the one to take its head once it is restrained.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will be the one to take its head once it is restrained.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will be the one to take its head once it is restrained.

records.m_Talk_ENG: D-drop the barrier?
records.m_Talk_DEU: D-drop the barrier?
records.m_Talk_FRA: D-drop the barrier?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's too dangerous! I'm the only one who can block that whale's bombardment!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's too dangerous! I'm the only one who can block that whale's bombardment!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's too dangerous! I'm the only one who can block that whale's bombardment!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate, we will only repeat a stalemate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate, we will only repeat a stalemate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate, we will only repeat a stalemate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. That mongrel will stake her life to protect you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. That mongrel will stake her life to protect you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. That mongrel will stake her life to protect you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errgh! Who are you calling a mongrel?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errgh! Who are you calling a mongrel?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errgh! Who are you calling a mongrel?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's coming...! Prepare yourselves. We only get one chance..!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's coming...! Prepare yourselves. We only get one chance..!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's coming...! Prepare yourselves. We only get one chance..!

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ars, Goetia...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ars, Goetia...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ars, Goetia...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-incredible...! You actually managed to restrain something that big...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-incredible...! You actually managed to restrain something that big...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-incredible...! You actually managed to restrain something that big...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ghk, ma'am! Now...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ghk, ma'am! Now...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ghk, ma'am! Now...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The whale disappeared! Don't tell me you finished it in a single strike?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The whale disappeared! Don't tell me you finished it in a single strike?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The whale disappeared! Don't tell me you finished it in a single strike?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I failed. The moment my blade made contact, it vanished.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I failed. The moment my blade made contact, it vanished.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I failed. The moment my blade made contact, it vanished.

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-below us! The whale is under our feet...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-below us! The whale is under our feet...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-below us! The whale is under our feet...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ghk, I feel dizzy...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ghk, I feel dizzy...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ghk, I feel dizzy...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kid...! Get out of there, now...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kid...! Get out of there, now...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kid...! Get out of there, now...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoever you are, it looks like you are having a rough time. Want a hand?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoever you are, it looks like you are having a rough time. Want a hand?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoever you are, it looks like you are having a rough time. Want a hand?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Is that you, Lamda?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Is that you, Lamda?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Is that you, Lamda?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How long has it been? Been doing well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long has it been? Been doing well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long has it been? Been doing well?
